description: Heywood Phase 1 — Structured post-event feedback from students and instructors. Supports AAR synthesis prompt (#15) and feeds Phase 2 NLP analysis. PII: Optional (anonymous by default, identified if instructor submission).

columns.name: EventTitle
columns.description: Name of the training event (links to TrainingSchedule.EventTitle)

columns.name: SubmitterRole
columns.description: Role of the person providing feedback

columns.name: SubmitterName
columns.description: Optional — student feedback may be anonymous. Instructor submissions should be identified. PII when populated.

columns.name: ObjectivesMet
columns.description: Were the stated training objectives achieved?

columns.name: InstructorEffectiveness
columns.description: Student feedback on instructor quality (student submissions only)

columns.name: ResourceAdequacy
columns.description: Were equipment, ammo, ranges, etc. adequate?

columns.name: Sustains
columns.description: What went well — keep doing. Structured AAR field.

columns.name: Improves
columns.description: What to change next time. Structured AAR field.

columns.name: SafetyConcerns
columns.description: Any safety issues observed. Flagged for immediate review.

columns.name: HasSafetyConcern
columns.description: Quick filter flag — true if SafetyConcerns is populated

columns.name: ReviewedBy
columns.description: SPC or staff member who reviewed this feedback

columns.name: ActionTaken
columns.description: What was done in response to this feedback

views.name: Pending Review
views.description: All unreviewed feedback requiring SPC/staff attention

views.name: Safety Alerts
views.description: All feedback with safety concerns — immediate review required

views.name: Event Summary
views.description: All feedback for a specific event — supports AAR synthesis

views.name: Trend View
views.description: Ratings over time for trend analysis in Power BI

views.name: Submit Feedback
views.description: Entry form view for students — anonymous by default

rowLevelSecurity.Student: Write-only (submit form), cannot read others' feedback
